function.name: read_file
function.description: Read the contents of a file at the given path relative to the workspace root.

path.description: Relative path to the file from workspace root.

function.name: write_file
function.description: Create or overwrite a file with the given content. Parent directories are created automatically.

path.description: Relative path to the file from workspace root.

content.description: Full content to write to the file.

function.name: list_directory
function.description: List files and directories at the given path relative to workspace root.

path.description: Relative path to the directory from workspace root. Use '.' for root.

function.name: run_command
function.description: Run a shell command in the workspace. Use for linting (ruff), type checking (mypy), or running tests (pytest). Returns stdout, stderr, and exit code.
